tests.scenario: Launch app and access main menu
steps: Verify the main menu is displayed
tests.expected_result: The main menu is displayed within 2 seconds

steps: Verify all menu items are displayed
tests.expected_result: All menu items are displayed and accessible

steps: Enter 'stress management' as a search query
tests.expected_result: At least 5 sessions focused on stress management are displayed within 1 minute

steps: Verify sessions for different mental health goals are listed
tests.expected_result: Sessions for various mental health goals are listed and accessible

steps: Navigate to the progress tracking page
tests.expected_result: A graphical representation of the session history is displayed

steps: Navigate to the progress tracking page
Verify the graph updates to reflect the new sessions
tests.expected_result: The graph updates to reflect the new sessions
The meditation session continues to play without interruption

steps: Verify the session audio continues to play
tests.expected_result: The session audio continues to play without interruption

steps: Sign up as a new user
tests.expected_result: At least 10 free meditation sessions are accessible without a subscription

steps: Sign up as a new user
Verify no more free sessions are available
tests.expected_result: No more than 10 free meditation sessions are available

tests.scenario: Report a bug and verify response
tests.expected_result: A confirmation response is received within 24 hours

steps: Verify the report is logged and acknowledged
tests.expected_result: The error report is logged and acknowledged

steps: Sign up as a new user
tests.expected_result: User data is encrypted using a standard encryption protocol

steps: Sign up as a new user
tests.expected_result: User data is stored securely and protected from unauthorized access
A list of relevant sessions is displayed within 2 seconds

steps: Verify relevant sessions are displayed for each query
tests.expected_result: Relevant sessions are displayed for each search query
At least 2 sessions tailored to the user's interests are displayed

steps: Verify recommendations match the user's interests
tests.expected_result: Recommendations match the user's interests and preferences

tests.scenario: Rate and review a meditation session
tests.expected_result: The rating is displayed on the session's details page within 1 hour

steps: Verify the rating is displayed on the session's details page
tests.expected_result: The rating is displayed on the session's details page
